back_translation: Children, obey your fathers and mothers in Lord Jesus, because this is what is right
‘Honor your father and mother’; this is the first commandment that has a promise attached
‘So that it may go well with you, and you may have a long life on the earth’
Fathers, do not provoke your children to anger; but raise them with the training and instruction of Lord Jesus
Slaves, obey your earthly-flesh masters with reverent fear and trembling, with sincerity of heart, like obeying Lord Christ
Not only doing this in front of their eyes, like those who seek to please humans; but as slaves of Lord Christ, doing the will of God from the soul
Serve with goodwill, as serving Lord Jesus and not serving humans
You know that each person — when they do any good — will receive in return that thing from Lord Jesus, whether they are slave or free
Masters, do the same thing toward your slaves; stop using threats; because you know that the master of theirs and of yours is in heaven, and there is no favoritism toward anyone with Him
Finally, be strong in Lord Jesus and in the powerful might of His strength
Put on the full armor of God, so that you may be able to stand firm against the schemes of the devil

Because our struggle is not against blood and flesh, but is against the rulers, against the authorities, against the world-rulers of darkness in this age, against the spiritual evil forces in the heavenly realms
Therefore, take up the full armor of God, so that you may be able to resist on the day of evil, and having done all things, to remain standing
Therefore, stand firm; gird your waist with truth; put on the breastplate of righteousness
And put shoes on your feet with the readiness of the gospel of peace
Above all things, lift up the shield of faith; with this shield, you will be able to extinguish all the flaming arrows of the evil one
And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God
By every kind of prayer and petition, pray at all times in the Spirit; for this purpose, stay alert with perseverance and petition for all the saints
And pray for me, so that when I open my mouth, words may be given to me, in order to proclaim the mystery of the gospel with boldness
For which I am an ambassador in chains for that gospel; pray that I may proclaim that gospel with boldness, as I should speak
So that you may know about my matters — what I am doing — Tychicus, the beloved brother and faithful servant in Lord Jesus, will inform you of all things
I have sent him to you for this very purpose, that you may know the news of us, and that he may encourage your hearts
May peace abide with the brothers, and love together with faith, from God the Father, and from Lord Jesus Christ
May grace abide with all who love our Lord Jesus Christ with love that does not decay
